task: The doctor examined the patient. She prescribed a new medication for the chronic condition.
The carpenter built the table for the family. It fit perfectly in their dining room.
Brian showed William the proposal. He approved it after reading it carefully twice.
The gardener planted the rose near the window. It bloomed beautifully throughout the summer months.
Sandra met Beatrice at the workshop. She had organized the entire weekend program.
The artist painted the portrait of the queen. It now hangs in the national gallery.
Robert congratulated Edward on the award. He had been nominated for years before winning.
The violinist played the new composition. It moved the audience to a standing ovation.
implementations: The pronoun "It" refers to "the new composition".

task: Diana taught Patricia how to swim. She had been afraid of water since childhood.
